chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-715 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 17.10.2022 Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional Advocate General, Sindh. == No one present on behalf of petitioner. No intimation is received. Matter as such is liable to be dismissed for non-prosecution; however, in order to have a decision on merit I have gone through the contents of petition, whereby petitioner seeks directions against the official respondents to provide him protection as private respondent No.5 is allegedly causing him harassment. At the very outset, Syed Zahid Ali Shah, Advocate appearing for respondent No.5 while denying the allegation leveled against said respondent states that no harassment shall be caused to the petitioner by the private respondent. Learned Additional Advocate General, Sindh denied the allegations leveled in the petition and stated that official respondents will act strictly in accordance with law rather on the whims and wishes of anyone, as alleged in the present petition. In view of this statement of learned Additional Advocate General, Sindh instant petition stands disposed of. However, it is made clear that every action of the respondents shall be subject to law and police shall not act at the behest of any influential person. JUDGE Muhammad Danish
